steps.title: Express A in two ways using the given percentages
steps.content:
Convert the given percentages to equations:
  • Mass of A is 416% of B gives $A = 4.16B$
  • Mass of A is 0.064% of C gives $A = 0.00064C$

steps.title: Set the expressions equal and solve for C in terms of B
steps.content:
Since both expressions equal $A$, equate them:
$$4.16B = 0.00064C$$
Divide both sides by $0.00064$:
$$C = \frac{4.16B}{0.00064}$$
Simplifying the coefficient: $\frac{4.16}{0.00064} = 6500$, so $C = 6500B$.

steps.title: Convert to percentage form and calculate p/1000
steps.content:
Since $C = 6500B$, the mass of $C$ is $650,000\%$ of the mass of $B$ (since $6500 \times 100\% = 650,000\%$). Thus $p = 650,000$. Therefore:
$$\frac{p}{1000} = \frac{650000}{1000} = 650$$
